seo.title: Hairstyle Lab – AI Hairstyle Generator & Preview | OpenCreator
seo.description: Try hairstyle ideas with AI and preview different cuts, lengths, and vibes before making styling decisions.

hero.title: Hairstyle Lab
hero.description: Try hairstyle ideas with AI-powered visuals. Explore different cuts, textures, and vibes on reference images or conceptual prompts, helping you generate hair-focused content and inspiration at scale.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Describe the hairstyle look you want to explore

steps.title: Describe or provide a reference base
steps.description: Start from a description or an optional reference image, including hair length, type, and any style cues (e.g., bob, layers, curls).

steps.title: Specify styles, eras, or moods
steps.description: Add details about the desired vibe—classic, edgy, K-pop inspired, retro, or everyday wearable—so results match your creative direction.

steps.title: Generate AI hairstyle variations
steps.description: The workflow produces multiple hairstyle-focused images that match your brief, suitable for moodboards, content, or inspiration.

steps.title: Curate and export for content or ideation
steps.description: Pick the most compelling looks, iterate if needed, then export for social content, creative decks, or personal inspiration.

whoIsFor.title: For creators and brands playing with hair visuals
whoIsFor.subtitle: Ideal for beauty, fashion, and content teams.

audiences.label: Beauty and hair brands
audiences.description: Develop hair-focused visuals for campaigns, tutorials, and social series without staging every photoshoot.

audiences.label: Stylists and salons
audiences.description: Explore style directions and share visual ideas with clients or audiences in a quick, low-pressure way.

audiences.label: Content creators and influencers
audiences.description: Generate hair transformation concepts and storytelling visuals that fuel ongoing content calendars.

audiences.label: Creative teams and agencies
audiences.description: Use the workflow as a fast ideation tool for hair-related storylines in fashion and beauty campaigns.

items.question: What is the Hairstyle Lab workflow?
items.answer: Hairstyle Lab is an AI workflow for generating hairstyle-focused visuals, helping you explore haircuts, styles, and moods for content and creative ideation.

items.question: What inputs should I provide?
items.answer: Provide a brief description of the desired hairstyle, and optionally a reference image or additional cues like color, texture, and styling details.

items.question: Can I use this with real client photos?
items.answer: You can work from reference-like images in your prompts, but always review outputs carefully and follow privacy and consent requirements for any real client likenesses.

items.question: Where can I use the generated visuals?
items.answer: Use them in moodboards, internal decks, social media content, or as inspiration for future shoots and styling decisions.

items.question: Does this replace professional hair photography?
items.answer: It’s best used as a complementary tool—great for exploring ideas and filling content gaps between shoots.

items.question: How is pricing structured?
items.answer: Each run consumes credits based on image generation, calibrated so you can explore multiple hairstyle directions in a single session.
